title: Default board of Item Widget in Monday docs
excerpt: I use a workdoc for a regular meeting with an embodied task board.  I often use the “Item” widget to allocate the new tasks from discussions in this meeting, which is great but it would be even better if the board was in…

posts.author: JanieW (Janie Walton)
posts.cookedHtml:
I use a workdoc for a regular meeting with an embodied task board. I often use the “Item” widget to allocate the new tasks from discussions in this meeting, which is great but it would be even better if the board was intelligent enough to realise that I always want to add the items to a particular board. So either some way to set the board default for the Item widget to be added to automatically (ideal solution) or at a minimum, the dropdown to be more intelligent and to show the most commonly used board or any boards embedded in the document first. This would mean my team mates wouldn’t have to wait in the meeting for me to search and find the right board, everytime I assign a new item. So this would save time for us all !
Please vote for this feature request if you also think this would be a huge time saver.
